component.name: taskTimer
component.summary: General-purpose kitchen and task timer for the desktop
Minuteur de cuisine et de tâches pour le bureau

description.p: taskTimer helps you track cooking steps, work sessions, or any timed activity. Create multiple named timers, see remaining time at a glance, and get notified when time is up. The standalone build uses GTK 3 with optional system tray support and desktop notifications.
Originally a GNOME Shell extension, taskTimer shares the same timer core between the extension and this desktop application.
taskTimer suit la cuisson, le travail en sessions ou toute activité chronométrée. Créez plusieurs minuteurs nommés, consultez le temps restant et recevez une alerte à la fin.
